# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

Report them privately using GitHub's [private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/JaimeOrtegaxyz/claude-to-codex/security/advisories/new) for this repository.

These commands shell out to `codex exec` and pass it conversation context, so issues like prompt/argument injection through the command templates are in scope. Please include reproduction steps and the impact you see.

## What to expect

- Acknowledgement within a few days.
- An assessment and, if accepted, a fix.
- Credit once a fix ships, unless you prefer to remain anonymous.

## Supported versions

Only the latest release (v2.x) is supported.
